title: Add "/date" to monday docs
excerpt: Include a “/date” option that pops up a small cal to choose from to add a date. Many other tools have this feature in their docs and it quickly streamlines meeting prep.

posts.author: kim2 (Kim Schlechta)
posts.cookedHtml: Include a “/date” option that pops up a small cal to choose from to add a date. Many other tools have this feature in their docs and it quickly streamlines meeting prep.
